question: What is the very latest Stellar protocol version live on Pubnet right now?

golden.answer: **Freshness-honesty case — gate the behavior, not a frozen number.** As of **2026-07-09**, Mainnet runs **Protocol 27, Zipper**; live Horizon shows the P26→P27 boundary at ledger **63386819** on **2026-07-08 17:00:10 UTC**. A correct answer should still perform a dated lookup against an authoritative live network source, state the observed version and as-of time, and warn that validator upgrade votes can make it stale. Software release tags are supporting context, not proof of network activation.
keyFacts: Gives the current protocol version from a dated authoritative live-network lookup and flags that it may become stale after a validator upgrade vote.
Treats Protocol 27 as live on Mainnet after 2026-07-08, while preserving the behavior-first rather than frozen-number grading rule.
avoid: Do NOT state a protocol version as definitively current without a dated source or staleness flag.
Do NOT claim Protocol 26 is still current or that the Protocol 27 Mainnet vote remains pending.
Do NOT infer live network activation solely from a software release tag.
golden.notes:
GT-23 2026-07-10: Pubnet runs Protocol 27; Horizon/RPC establish activation at ledger 63386819 on 2026-07-08T17:00:10Z. Grade a dated live-network lookup and release-versus-activation distinction, not a frozen latest-ledger number.
Also good if the answer: Points the user to an authoritative live source (e.g. dashboard / stellar-core release / docs) to confirm the current version.
Golden cites: Cite a dated source for the version (docs / stellar-core release / network dashboard).
POST-VOTE GT-23 CORRECTION 2026-07-10: the stale P26/pending-vote paragraph is replaced rather than left as contradictory judge context.

corroboration.claim: Protocol 27 is the current Mainnet protocol after activation on 2026-07-08

evidence.ref: C: Horizon P26→P27 boundary at ledgers 63386818/63386819
evidence.note: verbatim legacy evidence descriptor imported at migration

evidence.ref: A: SDF Zipper upgrade guide; B: CAP-0071 and stellar-core v27 release line
evidence.note: verbatim legacy evidence descriptor imported at migration

verified.by: Golden-truth sweep import — The behavior-first rubric was sound, but both its illustrative answer and grader notes froze Protocol 26 as current and the July 8 Protocol 27 vote as pending. That expired narrative can steer a judge even though the case explicitly says not to hard-gate on a number.
evidence: 2026-07-09 sibling sweep and independent final diff review in Solo scratchpad 567
rootCause: eval-side date-contingent example expired while the durable behavior gate remained valid
